mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Comments (board_id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM Comments c JOIN Users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM Comments c JOIN Users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
